Texto sobre imagem

300 / 400 / 500
Upright + Italic
"The part of Brazil
most travelers never find."
Where to stay changes what the city feels like.
DM Sans
Sans-serif funcional
Body, captions, UI
Nunca headlines

200 / 300 / 400
Sempre lowercase
Not every hotel that calls itself luxury earns it. We have walked through enough properties in Bahia to know the difference. What made our collection: properties where service is genuinely warm, locations that put you in the right part of the destination, and rooms that match their photography.
Trancoso, Bahia · Brazil · January 2026
Tipografia em contexto real
Fernando de Noronha, Brazil
The water is that color.
In real life.
Getting to Fernando de Noronha requires two flights and some planning. That is a feature, not a bug. The effort keeps it from ever becoming crowded. Only a limited number of visitors are allowed on the island at any given time.
Planning Noronha? Link in bio.

05 — Content Strategy

7 Content Pillars

01
Where to Stay in Brazil
Guias de curadoria, destinos, hotel vs villa, sazonalidade. Objetivo: se tornar a referencia em decisoes de hospedagem no Brasil.
25%
CarouselReelFeed
02
The Properties
Hotel e villa spotlights. Detalhes especificos que nao estao no site do hotel. Construir desejo por propriedades especificas.
25%
FeedCarousel
03
Destination Through a Stay
Conhecer o destino pelo prisma da hospedagem. Bairros, boas epocas para visitar, diferenca entre regioes.
15%
ReelStory
04
Brazil Reframed
Brasil vs Tulum, Ibiza, Maldivas. Reposicionar o Brasil para viajantes US/EU que ainda nao consideraram o pais.
10%
AdFeed
05
Why Voyu
Processo de curadoria, o que avaliamos, por que retiramos propriedades. Construir confianca e diferenciar de plataformas de booking.
10%
CarouselStory
06
The Guest Experience
Depoimentos de clientes, historias reais de viagem. Prova social para audiencia quente.
10%
StoryFeed
07
Lifestyle and Desire
Imagens puras de desejo. Uma foto, uma frase. Sem CTA. Sem venda. So construir a estetica da marca.
5%
Feed
06 — Copy System

Headlines and Wording

5 formulas de headline
Cena Evocativa
"Trancoso. The part of Brazil most travelers never find."
Reframe
"You've thought about Ibiza. Have you thought about Bahia?"
Curadoria Direta
"60 properties assessed. The best ones, curated for you."
Sinal de Confianca
"Not every hotel earns its reputation. These do."
Convite
"Tell us where you're going. We'll find the right stay."
Desejo
"Private pool. Private view. Private Brazil."
Captions completas, voz Voyu
Hotel, Rio de Janeiro, Pilar 02
"There's a hotel in Santa Teresa that sits on a hillside looking down at Rio, and has a pool that catches the city light at exactly the right hour."
The neighborhood is old tiles, faded grandeur, and artists who moved in before anyone noticed. The hotel fits perfectly. This is one of the properties in our Rio collection, for travelers who want the city with more texture than Ipanema gives.

Planning Rio? We know which hotel belongs to which version of the city. DM us or visit voyutravel.com.
Link in bio
Villa, Trancoso, Pilar 02
"No cars reach the Quadrado in Trancoso. The roads are red earth, the houses are painted in colors that only work in Bahia."
In the evening everyone ends up in the same square for reasons that become obvious the moment you arrive. The villa we'd put you in is 10 minutes away on foot. Private pool, direct access to the beach, the kind of privacy that changes the pace of a trip.

Thinking about Trancoso? DM us "Trancoso" and we'll send you our picks.
DM us Trancoso
Biblioteca de vocabulario
Use sempre
curatedconsideredspecificintimateprivateeditorialboutiqueunhurriedextraordinarygenuineentirely yourschanges the paceearns its placepersonally assessedwe know which room
Nunca use
best dealexclusive offer5-star luxuryaffordableyou deserveparadiseworld-classdon't miss outlimited timestunningamazingbreathtaking
Sistema de CTA por temperatura da audiencia
Tier 1, audiencia fria
Discovery
"Explore where to stay in Brazil"
"Follow for curated Brazil stays."
"Save this for your Brazil planning."
Tier 2, audiencia quente
Engagement
"DM us your destination. We'll send our picks."
"Tell us where you're going. We'll handle the rest."
"Thinking about Brazil? Start with where you'll stay."
Tier 3, conversao
Conversion
"Plan your Brazil stay, voyutravel.com"
"Ready to plan? Link in bio."
"No fees to inquire. Just tell us what you're looking for."
07 — Meta Ads

7 Ad Frameworks

01
Hotel-First Demand Generation
Lida com uma propriedade, uma vista, uma emocao. Audiencia fria. Cria desejo antes de mencionar a Voyu.
FriaStatic 4:5Awareness
02
Villa Desire Generation
Piscina privada, promessa de privacidade. Vende a sensacao de posse total. Sem lobby, sem fila, so seu Brasil.
FriaStatic + StoriesCasais
03
Brazil Destination Desire
Jogo de comparacao. Brasil vs Tulum, Ibiza, Maldivas. Eleva o Brasil para quem ja viajou o mundo.
FriaVideo/StaticReels
04
Trust and Service Differentiation
Autoridade de marca. Card escuro, logo prominente, afirmacao de curadoria. Converte seguidores engajados.
QuenteBrand Card 1:1Confianca
05
Lead Generation Direct Response
Menor atrito possivel para consulta. "Tell us where you're going." Sem taxa, resposta em 24h. Retargeting de visitantes do site.
ConversaoDM / Send MessageQuente
06
Remarketing Non-Converters
Re-engajamento de visitantes que nao fizeram consulta. Carousel das melhores propriedades. Urgencia leve baseada em sazonalidade.
RetargetingCarouselQuente
07
Warm Audience Conversion
Liderado por depoimento. Citacao de hospede com destino e propriedade. Prova social para seguidores que engajaram 3 ou mais vezes.
QuenteTestimonial CardProva Social
Fria
Frameworks 1, 2, 3
Awareness
Interest
Quente
Framework 4
Consideration
Confianca
Conversao
Framework 5, 6
Consulta
Booking
Fidelidade
Framework 7
Repeat
Indicacao
Budget sugerido, R$1.000
Distribuicao inicial
R$400 — Frameworks 1 e 3 (cold, awareness, Brasil vs mundo)
R$300 — Framework 5 (lead gen, remarketing do site)
R$200 — Framework 2 (villa desire, casais e familias)
R$100 — Framework 4 (brand card, confianca, warm)
Protocolo de teste A/B
Variante A — Imagem editorial, emocao, desejo
Variante B — Afirmacao de autoridade, copy pesado, confianca
Variante C — Resposta direta, conversao

Nunca testar algo fora da marca. Os dados decidem entre variacoes on-brand.
08 — Templates

Ready-to-Use Templates

Posts de feed, plug and publish
A1, single image
Iconic Hotel Anchor
"[Destino]. Not every hotel earns its reputation. [Hotel] does, and here's why we keep recommending it to travelers who want to do it differently this time."
A2, single image
The Private Pool Post
"A pool that belongs only to you. [Forest / ocean / jungle] on the other side. [1 detalhe especifico.] This is one of the villas in our [Destino] collection."
A3, single image
Brazil vs The World
"You've been to [competitor]. Have you considered what's waiting in [Brazilian destination]? Brazil is unexpectedly, and relentlessly, beautiful."
A4, single image
First Time in Brazil
"First time in Brazil? The most important decision you'll make is where you'll stay. The right property puts you in the right neighborhood, at the right pace."
A5, single image
The Detail Shot
"[Frase evocativa, 8 a 15 palavras maximo.] [Propriedade], [Destino]." Post de puro desejo. Deixa a imagem falar. Sem CTA de conversao.
A6, single image
The Honest Hotel Take
"Not every hotel that calls itself luxury earns it. [Hotel] earned its place in our collection for one reason: [razao especifica e concreta]. We only recommend what we'd choose ourselves."
Carousels, 7 slides
B1, 7 slides
Where to Stay in [Destino]
Cover, hoteis 1 a 5, slide de CTA. Caption: "We've narrowed it to [X] that actually deliver, for different travelers and different [Destino] experiences."
B2, 7 slides
Hotel vs Villa in Brazil
Framework de decisao. Split, caso para hotel, caso para villa, escolha hotel se, escolha villa se, a resposta, CTA. Perfeito para mid-funnel.
B4, 7 slides
How We Choose Properties
Construtor de autoridade. "We stay there. We evaluate service at 10pm. We look at what the photos don't show." Para audiencia quente que precisa de confianca.
Story sequences
D1, 3 stories
Our Pick for [Destino]
Story 1: card de introducao. Story 2: imagem da propriedade com detalhes. Story 3: CTA via DM. Sequencia rapida de alto desejo. Use para spotlight semanal.
D3, 2 stories
Hotel ou Villa, Poll
Story 1: Poll sticker, Rio boutique hotel ou Trancoso private villa? Story 2 apos 24h: resultados e nossa recomendacao para cada perfil. Alto engajamento.
D5, 4 stories
Mito: Brasil e difícil de viajar
Mito, realidade, como a Voyu ajuda, CTA. Sequencia para tratar objecoes de audiencia fria e quente. Aborda a barreira principal de viajantes US/EU.
09 — Quality Control

Pre-Publish Checklist

Isso parece que pertence a uma revista de viagem premium?
Ha uma mensagem clara, sem duas competindo?
A logo esta posicionada corretamente e com boa legibilidade?
O copy usa detalhes especificos, nao adjetivos genericos?
Nenhuma mencao a preco, desconto ou "melhor oferta"?
O CTA corresponde a temperatura da audiencia, fria, quente ou conversao?
A imagem tem tonalidade quente e editoral, sem aparencia de stock?
A tipografia segue o brand kit, Cormorant mais DM Sans, apenas?
Um leitor da Conde Nast Traveler confiaria nessa marca?
Isso faz o Brasil parecer desejavel, sofisticado e que vale a pena?
Se qualquer resposta for "nao", revisar antes de publicar.
Posicionamento Brasil por origem do cliente
Cliente vem de
Lidere com
US, NYC e LA
Facilidade, beleza, descoberta. "Brasil e mais perto do que voce pensa."
UK e Europa
Design, cultura, autenticidade. "A parte do Brasil que e genuinamente diferente."
Viajantes Tulum
Trancoso. Mais autentico, menos comercializado, villas privadas.
Ibiza e Mediterraneo
Costa da Bahia. Agua mais quente, menos lotado, comida extraordinaria.
Maldivas e Bali
Fernando de Noronha. Mesma qualidade de agua, muito mais carater.
Caribe
Costa da Bahia. Melhor comida, mais design, agua igual ou melhor.
10 — Seasonal Strategy

Brazil Moments Calendar

International travelers plan months in advance. These are the moments that turn a vague interest in Brazil into a booking. Each one is an acquisition event, not just content.

February / March
Carnaval
The brief
"The world's largest party, from the right hotel window."
Rio's Carnaval fills every hotel months out. The angle for Voyu is not the Sambadrome seats. It is where you stay the morning after. The rooftop. The neighborhood that empties at midnight and fills with music. The boutique hotel in Santa Teresa that feels like a private front-row seat.

Targeting window: November to January (4-month lead).
Rio de Janeiro Salvador da Bahia Olinda
The brief
"Two million people. One beach. Where you stay changes everything."
Copacabana New Year is the largest fireworks show on Earth. The question Voyu answers: which hotel puts you close enough to feel it without losing access to everything else. The Ipanema boutique with the rooftop. The Leblon suite with the quiet. The Santa Teresa villa for a group of 10.

Targeting window: October to November (6-week urgency push in December).
Rio, Copacabana Trancoso Florianopolis
December / January
Reveillon
December
Christmas in Brazil
A summer Christmas. 35 degrees. The beach in the morning, a festive dinner facing the ocean at night. For Americans and Europeans who have done every Alpine Christmas, this is the alternative that reframes the holiday entirely.

Key stays: villas in Trancoso, Buzios, Florianopolis.
Year-round
Amazonia
The counterpoint to beach Brazil. For travelers who have done every luxury lodge in Africa and are ready for the river. Floating lodges, jungle bungalows, wildlife that has no equivalent elsewhere. Best season: July to November (low water, easier access).
November
F1 Sao Paulo
The Brazilian Grand Prix at Interlagos draws 300,000 people. The design hotels in Vila Madalena and Jardins fill months out. The angle: extend the trip. Fly into Sao Paulo, race weekend, then 5 nights in Trancoso or Rio. Voyu plans the full itinerary.

Targeting window: July to September.
June to October
Pantanal
The world's largest tropical wetland. More jaguar sightings per hour than anywhere on Earth. The lodges here are small, exceptional, and designed for travelers who have done Kenya and are ready for something new. Dry season makes wildlife concentration extraordinary.
January to June
Lencois Maranhenses
White sand dunes filled with turquoise lagoons after the rainy season. No other landscape like it on Earth. The stay is a small boutique pousada in Barreirinhas. The experience is a half-day walk through a landscape that looks like a rendering.
November to March
Jericoacoara
No paved roads. Access by buggy. The best kite-surfing conditions in South America. A village that has somehow kept its beauty intact. The boutique pousadas here are as good as anything on the coast. Best winds: November to March.
Headlines prontos para cada momento
Carnaval
"The world's greatest party. You need to be in the right hotel."
"Rio in February. We know exactly where to put you."
New Year / Reveillon
"Two million people on Copacabana. You have a rooftop."
"The best New Year's Eve on Earth. Voyu puts you in the right building."
Christmas
"A summer Christmas. The beach in the morning, the table outside at night."
"You have done every European Christmas. Try this one."
F1 Sao Paulo
"Race weekend in Sao Paulo. Then 5 nights in Trancoso. We plan both."
"Interlagos and then the coast. The Brazilian Grand Prix, done right."
Amazonia
"You have done Kenya. You have done Patagonia. Now the Amazon."
"The floating lodge in the Amazon. The kind of place you describe for years."
Pantanal
"More jaguar sightings per day than anywhere else on Earth."
"Africa had the Big Five. Brazil has the Pantanal."
